response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 2014-2015 role; their primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols like MQTT/OPC UA required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in distributed systems, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience relevant to industrial automation
Absence of documented work with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial communication protocols
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with core C++ requirements
